The Boss Mirage will inflict a Quantum/Imaginary-Type Infusion status on targets, and <color=#f29e38ff>being inflicted by both Type Infusion statuses simultaneously</color> will result in being inflicted with the Snarelock state.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize attacking specific targets to remove the Type Infusion effect from its targets. Eliminate all parts of the Boss Mirage before regeneration to inflict Weakness Break on the Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage's parts will inflict a Quantum/Imaginary-Type Infusion status on targets. After defeating them, they will enter the Feigned Death state and have their actions delayed. In their next action, they regenerate.
PhaseList.Name: Starbane Doombringer

Child.Desc: Attacks to the parts will also reduce HP on the main body
Child.Name: Body Part

TagList.Desc: The Boss Mirage cannot be attacked directly. When all three <color=#f29e38ff><u>parts</u></color> of the Boss Mirage are in Feigned Death simultaneously, the Boss Mirage enters Weakness Break state and can be attacked. During this state, its actions are additionally delayed, and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Transfers the Weakness Type to the target. The Weakness Type returns to this unit after the target is defeated, and additionally reduces Toughness.
Child.Name: Transfer

TagList.Desc: The Antimatter Engine <color=#f29e38ff><u>transfers</u></color> its own weakness type to Disaster's Right Hand and Dawn's Left Hand. However, when Disaster's Right Hand or Dawn's Left Hand is defeated, the Antimatter Engine's Toughness is additionally reduced.
TagList.Name: Battlefield Transfer

TagList.Desc: After using a single-target ability, enemy units gain increased SPD for 1 turn. After using an AoE ATK ability, their ATK increases for 1 turn. Using a Support ability recovers HP to the target of the ability.
TagList.Name: Battle Hardened

TagList.Desc: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness-Type</color> they have increases DMG received.
TagList.Name: Tenacious Resolve

TextGuideList: Defeating all three parts of the Boss Mirage and causing them to <color=#f29e38ff>enter Feigned Death simultaneously</color> can inflict Weakness Break on Boss Mirage, allowing DMG to be dealt directly to it.

When allies are under <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum/Imaginary Infusion</color> status, promptly attack targets with the same Type icon to remove the Type Infusion status and prevent falling into the Snarelock state.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

When Boss Mirage <color=#f29e38ff>loses their first layer of Toughness</color>, it immediately enters the <color=#f29e38ff>"Shackle Shatter"</color> state. Boss Mirage will also enter the "Shackle Shatter" state after taking a certain number of actions while not in that state.

After entering the "Shackle Shatter" state, Boss Mirage <color=#f29e38ff>changes their attack patterns</color>. Furthermore, defeating a summoned "Long-Shattered Vessel" will immediately cause a new "Long-Shattered Vessel" to be summoned.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before Boss Mirage uses their powerful ability, defeat as many "Long-Shattered Vessels" as possible to lower the "Calamity Power" stacks. Prioritize defeating "Complete Vessels."
PhaseList.Desc: After losing the first layer of Toughness or after taking a certain number of actions, Boss Mirage enters the "Shackle Shatter" state, changes their attack patterns, and summons "Long-Shattered Vessel" that can continually be resummoned.
PhaseList.Name: Flame Reaver of Doomsday Led Astray

TagList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Alternates between using "Dying Sobs" and "But Suffering is Essential." "Dying Sobs" summons "Long-Shattered Vessel" and enters Charging state, and "But Suffering is Essential" deals Powerful Attacks. "Calamity Power" stacks increases the Hits Per Action of Powerful Attacks. After destroying "Long-Shattered Vessel," Toughness and "Calamity Power" stacks can be reduced. In the second phase, "Silent Sorrow" and "Cry Not for the Discarded" will be used, and "Calamity Power" stacks increases.
Child.Name: Shackle Shatter

TagList.Desc: After losing the first layer of Toughness or after taking a certain number of actions, Boss Mirage enters the "<color=#f29e38ff><u>Shackle Shatter</u></color>" state, changes their attack patterns.
TagList.Name: Shackle Shatter

TagList.Desc: Defeating "Complete Vessel" no longer reduces Boss Mirage's Toughness.
TagList.Name: Creeping Haze

TagList.Desc: Max HP of all "Long-Shattered Vessels" and "Complete Vessels" increases.
TagList.Name: Vessel Enhancement

Buff.Desc: When enemy units with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> have their <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels all control debuffs, recovers Skill Points, and activates Ultimates for all allies.\nAll enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more DoT. Increases Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: When an ally target consumes 1 Skill Point, increases the DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).
BuffList1.Name: Fight in Unity

BuffList1.Desc: After defeating enemy targets, increases Break DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> to a max of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> stack(s). This effect will also take effect on new enemies entering the battlefield.
BuffList1.Name: Tangled Chaos

BuffList1.Desc: After any ally target consumes their own HP, their CRIT DMG increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList1.Name: No Turning Back

BuffList2.Desc: Increases Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> against enemy targets in Weakness Broken state.
BuffList2.Name: Fatality Exploitation

BuffList2.Desc: When allies use Basic ATK or Skill to attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately deal DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.
BuffList2.Name: Obstinate Weed

BuffList2.Desc: After the character in position 1 in the team uses Ultimate, their Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList2.Name: Heroic Vanguard

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

When Boss Mirage enters the "Lunar Devourer" state, Weakness Protection will be removed, and the strongest ally character must be selected to engage in "Going Solo" against Boss Mirage. During "Going Solo," apart from the selected character and their summoned unit, all other ally targets will enter the Departed state.
When an ally defeats an enemy Wolftrooper, gain "Blood Surge." The character entering "Going Solo" and their summoned unit will be enhanced based on "Blood Surge" stacks.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state, defeat as many Wolftroopers as possible to gain enhancements.
PhaseList.Desc: When Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state, the strongest ally character must be selected to engage in "Going Solo" against Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I: Clash of Wind and Lightning

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat Wolftroopers before Boss Mirage acts to prevent Wolftroopers from being eliminated by Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage's abilities deal DMG to Wolftroopers. This is additionally enhanced when Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II: Devourer of Heaven and Moon

TagList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: When the Boss Mirage uses "Barrenness of Earth Gouged," all other Wolftroopers will be eliminated.
TagList.Name: Better Safe Than Sorry

TagList.Desc: After Boss Mirage enters Phase II, it gains extra action per turn during "Going Solo."
TagList.Name: Apex Predator

TagList.Desc: After Boss Mirage enters "Going Solo," reduces its DMG taken by an additional <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Till Death

TextGuideList: Prioritize defeating Wolftroopers before Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state to grant "Blood Surge" to allies and accelerate Boss Mirage's progression toward "Lunar Devourer" state.
Reserve strength as Boss Mirage is about to enter "Lunar Devourer" state to better handle "Going Solo."
During "Going Solo," if the selected ally character has a summon, the summoned unit will enter "Going Solo" alongside the character.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and all other parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When the Boss Mirage's parts get <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, the Toughness of the Boss Mirage will be reduced.

When the Boss Mirage uses "Soul-Shattering Malediction," causes ally characters to <color=#f29e38ff>enter the "Malediction" state</color>. Ally characters and summons in the "Malediction" state will Depart the field. At the same time, summons Bloodstained Lupine to replace the Departed character and continue the battle, and the "Bloodstained Lupine"'s attacks can cause <color=#f29e38ff>heavy Toughness Reduction</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: When "Soul-Shattering Malediction" is used, prioritize selecting non-DMG dealing ally characters as the target of the ability.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Soul-Shattering Malediction" to inflict the "Malediction" effect on allies.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Unyielding Winds

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Do what you can to break all parts before "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" is used.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" to deal high DMG and debuffs.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Sweep the Heavens

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

TagList.Desc: The duration of <color=#f29e38ff>"Malediction"</color> state increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage's Toughness increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Sickleclawed Sawteeth

TagList.Desc: The duration of <color=#f29e38ff>"Malediction"</color> state increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
TagList.Name: Beastly Rage

TextGuideList: Weakness Break Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>parts</color> multiple times to effectively reduce Boss Mirage's Toughness. <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> Boss Mirage to greatly increase the DMG taken by itself and all its parts, while recovering Skill Points and activating Ultimates for all allies.

When <color=#f29e38ff>"Bloodstained Lupine"</color> replaces an ally character in battle, it will additionally <color=#f29e38ff>reduce Toughness irrespective of Weakness Types</color> based on the <color=#f29e38ff>number of DoT debuffs</color> inflicted on the enemy target attacked. "Bloodstained Lupine's" <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> can restore HP for all ally targets, and its <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> can hit multiple enemy targets while greatly reducing their Toughness. This <color=#f29e38ff>does not consume Skill Points</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

When Boss Mirage enters the "Lunar Devourer" state, Weakness Protection will be removed, and the strongest ally character must be selected to engage in "Going Solo" against Boss Mirage. During "Going Solo," apart from the selected character and their summoned unit, all other ally targets will enter the Departed state.
When an ally defeats an enemy Wolftrooper, gain "Blood Surge." The character entering "Going Solo" and their summoned unit will be enhanced based on "Blood Surge" stacks.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state, defeat as many Wolftroopers as possible to gain enhancements.
PhaseList.Desc: When Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state, the strongest ally character must be selected to engage in "Going Solo" against Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I: Clash of Wind and Lightning

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat Wolftroopers before Boss Mirage acts to prevent Wolftroopers from being eliminated by Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage's abilities deal DMG to Wolftroopers. This is additionally enhanced when Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II: Devourer of Heaven and Moon

TagList.Desc: Decreases DMG taken by Boss Mirage by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: When the Boss Mirage uses "Barrenness of Earth Gouged," all other Wolftroopers will be eliminated.
TagList.Name: Better Safe Than Sorry

TagList.Desc: After Boss Mirage enters Phase II, it gains extra action per turn during "Going Solo."
TagList.Name: Apex Predator

TagList.Desc: After Boss Mirage enters "Going Solo," reduces its DMG taken by an additional <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Till Death

TextGuideList: Prioritize defeating Wolftroopers before Boss Mirage enters "Lunar Devourer" state to grant "Blood Surge" to allies and accelerate Boss Mirage's progression toward "Lunar Devourer" state.
Reserve strength as Boss Mirage is about to enter "Lunar Devourer" state to better handle "Going Solo."
During "Going Solo," if the selected ally character has a summon, the summoned unit will enter "Going Solo" alongside the character.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and all other parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When the Boss Mirage's parts get <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, the Toughness of the Boss Mirage will be reduced.

When the Boss Mirage uses "Soul-Shattering Malediction," causes ally characters to <color=#f29e38ff>enter the "Malediction" state</color>. Ally characters and summons in the "Malediction" state will Depart the field. At the same time, summons Bloodstained Lupine to replace the Departed character and continue the battle, and the "Bloodstained Lupine"'s attacks can cause <color=#f29e38ff>heavy Toughness Reduction</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: When "Soul-Shattering Malediction" is used, prioritize selecting non-DMG dealing ally characters as the target of the ability.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Soul-Shattering Malediction" to inflict the "Malediction" effect on allies.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Unyielding Winds

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Do what you can to break all parts before "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" is used.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" to deal high DMG and debuffs.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Sweep the Heavens

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Buff.Desc: When enemy units with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels control effects for all allies, activates Ultimates and restores HP.\nAll enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more Memosprite Skill DMG, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> more Skill DMG.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: Increases Physical DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and decreases all enemies' Physical RES by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList1.Name: Armed Up

BuffList1.Desc: When allies use Basic ATK or Skill to attack Weakness Broken enemies, all DoTs currently applied to the enemies will immediately produce DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the original DMG.
BuffList1.Name: Obstinate Weed

BuffList1.Desc: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList1.Name: Rime Piercer

BuffList2.Desc: DMG dealt by memosprites ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF.
BuffList2.Name: Unstoppable Force

BuffList2.Desc: Increases all allies' Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. At the start of their turn, if their current HP percentage is equal to or lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP.
BuffList2.Name: Innervation

BuffList2.Desc: When a character uses Ultimate, increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList2.Name: Unstoppable Momentum

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When there is a summon present in the battle, Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff>transfer its own Weakness Type to the summon</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat the summons first. If Gepard uses a Collective Shield, quickly break the shield and defeat Gepard.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will use abilities to Freeze and deal DMG to targets. Gepard can Shield his team.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I — Annihilator of Desolation Mistral

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: After defeating the summons, quickly break Boss Mirage's Weakness.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will keep using Last Choir of Genesis to deal massive DMG to everyone, as well as abilities that will restrict the team's actions.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II — Annihilator of Desolation Mistral: Mother of Deception

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Transfers the Weakness Type to the target. The Weakness Type returns to this unit after the target is defeated, and additionally reduces Toughness.
Child.Name: Transfer

TagList.Desc: Gepard will join the battle and provide protection for Boss Mirage. Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff><u>Transfer</u></color> its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.
TagList.Name: Battlefield Transfer

Child.Desc: After using a single-target ability, the unit will re-select the target and use the ability again.
Child.Name: Follow-Up Usage

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage's summon will mark 1 target. After Boss Mirage uses a single-target ability, it will deliver a <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up Usage</u></color> on the marked target.
TagList.Name: Nowhere to Escape

TagList.Desc: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness-Type</color> they have increases DMG received.
TagList.Name: Tenacious Resolve

TextGuideList: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and the team's action is Advanced Forward.
Defeat or break <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> first to effectively weaken Boss Mirage.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

In this combat, ally targets' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.

When an ally target's HP decreases, the Boss Mirage in "Dream of Demise" state will accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches its maximum, Boss Mirage enters the "Fragrance of Death" state, greatly enhancing the abilities of Boss Mirage and its summons.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize healing ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Desc: In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Deathwish

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before "Death Wishes For More Death" is used, restore HP to dispel the "HP Overload" state from all ally units.
PhaseList.Desc: When Boss Mirage uses "Death Wishes For More Death," it will deal fatal damage to ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: From Death, Comes Life

Child.Desc: Transfers the Weakness Type to the target. The Weakness Type returns to this unit after the target is defeated, and additionally reduces Toughness.
Child.Name: Transfer

TagList.Desc: Gepard will join the battle and provide protection for Boss Mirage. Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff><u>Transfer</u></color> its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.
TagList.Name: Battlefield Transfer

Child.Desc: After using a single-target ability, the unit will re-select the target and use the ability again.
Child.Name: Follow-Up Usage

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage's summon will mark 1 target. After Boss Mirage uses a single-target ability, it will deliver a <color=#f29e38ff><u>Follow-Up Usage</u></color> on the marked target.
TagList.Name: Nowhere to Escape

TagList.Desc: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness-Type</color> they have increases DMG received.
TagList.Name: Tenacious Resolve

TextGuideList: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and the team's action is Advanced Forward.
Defeat or break <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> first to effectively weaken Boss Mirage.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

In this combat, ally targets' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.

When an ally target's HP decreases, the Boss Mirage in "Dream of Demise" state will accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches its maximum, Boss Mirage enters the "Fragrance of Death" state, greatly enhancing the abilities of Boss Mirage and its summons.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize healing ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Desc: In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Deathwish

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before "Death Wishes For More Death" is used, restore HP to dispel the "HP Overload" state from all ally units.
PhaseList.Desc: When Boss Mirage uses "Death Wishes For More Death," it will deal fatal damage to ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: From Death, Comes Life

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
TagList.Name: Withered Verdure

TagList.Desc: "The Long Arms of Sorrow's" Max Toughness increases.
TagList.Name: Tender the Rigid

TagList.Desc: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Type</color> they have increases DMG received.
TagList.Name: Tenacious Resolve

TextGuideList: When ally targets enter the "HP Overload" state, their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency are greatly reduced. Prioritize restoring their HP to dispel this state.
Inflicting Weakness Break on "The Long Arms of Sorrow" will reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and HP. If the Boss Mirage is in the "Fragrance of Death" state, it will also restore allies' HP.

Buff.Desc: When enemy targets with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and restore HP.\nAll enemy targets take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> more Memosprite Skill DMG, and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> more Ultimate DMG.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: At the start of battle, when there are 2/3/4 Remembrance characters in the team, increases the DMG enemy targets received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> / <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> / <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> respectively. This effect also applies to all new enemies that enter combat.
BuffList1.Name: Brand of Anamnesis

BuffList1.Desc: Increases Ice DMG dealt by all ally targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList1.Name: Hardened by Frost

BuffList1.Desc: After the character in position 1 in the team uses Ultimate, increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList1.Name: Heroic Vanguard

BuffList2.Desc: When ally targets deal DMG to enemy targets afflicted with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> DoT states or more, increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList2.Name: Dire Straits

BuffList2.Desc: Increases the Weakness Break DMG received by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases Super Break DMG received by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList2.Name: Stunning Remark

BuffList2.Desc: Increases CRIT DMG of all allies' Basic ATK and Ultimate DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, with an additional increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> against enemy targets that are Weakness Broken.
BuffList2.Name: Sweeping Force

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Boss Mirage gains a set amount of <color=#f29e38ff>"Insect Egg"</color> at the end of every turn. Lose 1 Insect Egg when attacked by <color=#f29e38ff>"Entomon Eulogy" or "Decay Eulogy."</color>

Boss Mirage can consume "Insect Eggs" to enhance Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Growth Hormone"</color>. Each stack increases ATK and provides additional enhancement when reaching 3 stacks.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: When Boss Mirage has Insect Eggs, prioritize defeating the summons and use the "Entomon Eulogy" and "Decay Eulogy" attacks of the summons to reduce Boss Mirage's Insect Eggs.
PhaseList.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of Insect Eggs. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of "Growth Hormone."
PhaseList.Name: Phase One: Insect Nest First Foray

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize defeating "Lesser Sting" to prevent being attacked with "Bursting Detonation" and entering the Outrage state.
PhaseList.Desc: When the Boss Mirage's "Devoured by the Swarm" is triggered, more summons will appear, and it will also summon "Lesser Stings."
PhaseList.Name: Phase Two: Misfortune Swarm Disaster

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of Insect Eggs. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of "Growth Hormone."
Child.Name: Insect Egg

TagList.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Insect Eggs</u></color>. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of "Growth Hormone."
TagList.Name: Insect Egg Fission

Child.Desc: Every stack of "Growth Hormones" increases ATK by a certain amount, stacking up to 3 times. When 3 stacks are reached, Swarm summons will unlock Bonus Abilities.
Child.Name: Growth Hormones

TagList.Desc: Every time Boss Mirage summons a certain number of Swarm summons, the next summon it summons will come automatically with 1 stack of "<color=#f29e38ff><u>Growth Hormone</u></color>."
TagList.Name: Hormone Secretion

TagList.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, the number of Insect Eggs gained through "Nesting Incubation" increases.
TagList.Name: Egg Burst

TextGuideList: Prioritize <color=#f29e38ff>defeating the summons</color> and use the <color=#f29e38ff>"Entomon Eulogy" and "Decay Eulogy"</color> attacks of the summons to reduce Boss Mirage's Insect Eggs and Toughness.
Use abilities capable of <color=#f29e38ff>AoE ATK</color> to attack Boss Mirage while defeating the summons.
When allies are in <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum Entanglement or Outrage</color> states, use abilities to <color=#f29e38ff>dispel the debuffs</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When a new Lotus is summoned, the Boss Mirage will enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness Protection</color> state.

Every time Abundance Lotus is defeated, all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>All-Type DMG</color> can be increased. Every time Destruction Lotus is defeated, all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Break Effect</color> can be increased. After obtaining one of the two buffs above, the other will become unable to be obtained.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat as many Abundance Lotus or Destruction Lotus (choose one or the other) to gain more buffs.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will switch between the Abundance Form and the Destruction Form, and will summon a Lotus while switching.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I: Versicolored Radiance

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Try to defeat the summoned entities before they use Eternal Condemnation to gain buffs and Weaken the power of Eternal Condemnation.
PhaseList.Desc: Entities summoned by Boss Mirage will lock onto a target and use Eternal Condemnation against them, dealing massive DMG.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II: Greed Breeds Danger

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Toughness cannot be reduced.
Child.Name: Toughness Protection

TagList.Desc: When a new Lotus is summoned, Boss Mirage will enter the <color=#f29e38ff><u> Toughness Protection</u></color> state. Defeating any summon will dispel the Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and deal additional Toughness Reduction to the Boss Mirage.
TagList.Name: Flower By Another Name

TagList.Desc: In Phase I, when Boss Mirage changes form, the summons will restore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> HP.
TagList.Name: Withered Tree's Revival

TagList.Desc: In Phase II, the summons' Max HP increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Hollowflower Blaze

TextGuideList: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and the team's action is Advanced Forward.
Defeating <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> will dispel Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and Weaken Boss Mirage.

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of Insect Eggs. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of "Growth Hormone."
Child.Name: Insect Egg

TagList.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, Boss Mirage will gain a certain number of <color=#f29e38ff><u>Insect Eggs</u></color>. Boss Mirage can consume Insect Egg to enhance its Swarm summons and grant them 1 stack of "Growth Hormone."
TagList.Name: Insect Egg Fission

Child.Desc: Every stack of "Growth Hormones" increases ATK by a certain amount, stacking up to 3 times. When 3 stacks are reached, Swarm summons will unlock Bonus Abilities.
Child.Name: Growth Hormones

TagList.Desc: Every time Boss Mirage summons a certain number of Swarm summons, the next summon it summons will come automatically with 1 stack of "<color=#f29e38ff><u>Growth Hormone</u></color>."
TagList.Name: Hormone Secretion

TagList.Desc: At the end of Boss Mirage's turn, the number of Insect Eggs gained through "Nesting Incubation" increases.
TagList.Name: Egg Burst

TextGuideList: Prioritize <color=#f29e38ff>defeating the summons</color> and use the <color=#f29e38ff>"Entomon Eulogy" and "Decay Eulogy"</color> attacks of the summons to reduce Boss Mirage's Insect Eggs and Toughness.
Use abilities capable of <color=#f29e38ff>AoE ATK</color> to attack Boss Mirage while defeating the summons.
When allies are in <color=#f29e38ff>Quantum Entanglement or Outrage</color> states, use abilities to <color=#f29e38ff>dispel the debuffs</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When a new Lotus is summoned, the Boss Mirage will enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness Protection</color> state.

Every time Abundance Lotus is defeated, all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>All-Type DMG</color> can be increased. Every time Destruction Lotus is defeated, all allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Break Effect</color> can be increased. After obtaining one of the two buffs above, the other will become unable to be obtained.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat as many Abundance Lotus or Destruction Lotus (choose one or the other) to gain more buffs.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will switch between the Abundance Form and the Destruction Form, and will summon a Lotus while switching.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I: Versicolored Radiance

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Try to defeat the summoned entities before they use Eternal Condemnation to gain buffs and Weaken the power of Eternal Condemnation.
PhaseList.Desc: Entities summoned by Boss Mirage will lock onto a target and use Eternal Condemnation against them, dealing massive DMG.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II: Greed Breeds Danger

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Toughness cannot be reduced.
Child.Name: Toughness Protection

TagList.Desc: When a new Lotus is summoned, Boss Mirage will enter the <color=#f29e38ff><u> Toughness Protection</u></color> state. Defeating any summon will dispel the Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and deal additional Toughness Reduction to the Boss Mirage.
TagList.Name: Flower By Another Name

TagList.Desc: In Phase I, when Boss Mirage changes form, the summons will restore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> HP.
TagList.Name: Withered Tree's Revival

TagList.Desc: In Phase II, the summons' Max HP increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Hollowflower Blaze

TextGuideList: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and the team's action is Advanced Forward.
Defeating <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> will dispel Boss Mirage's Toughness Protection and Weaken Boss Mirage.

Choose the appropriate Lotus to defeat based on the needs of characters: Defeat Abundance Lotus to increase allies' <color=#f29e38ff>All-Type DMG</color>, or defeat Destruction Lotus to increase allies' <color=#f29e38ff>Break Effect</color>.

Buff.Desc: When enemy targets with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and recovers Skill Points.\nIncreases Break DMG taken by all enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and Memosprite Skill DMG taken by<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: Increases Break DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When an enemy target enters the Weakness Break state, further increases Break DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. This effect can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).
BuffList1.Name: Shatterstrike

BuffList1.Desc: The 1st character in the lineup ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the enemy target's DEF when dealing DMG.
BuffList1.Name: Linebreaker

BuffList1.Desc: When ally targets consume Skill Points, increases their CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> times.
BuffList1.Name: Unto Apotheosis

BuffList2.Desc: When there are 3 ally memosprites or more currently on the field, increases all allies' DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList2.Name: Past Life: Shadowed Reverie

BuffList2.Desc: After ally targets attack an enemy target with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> or more DoT states, increases their SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList2.Name: Whirlwind Turn

BuffList2.Desc: While any character following the Path of Erudition is in the team, increases all allies' All-Type RES PEN by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList2.Name: Knowledge and Decorum

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
"Soulfreed" <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> will be greatly enhanced.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat the enhanced summons first to weaken Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will summon 2 types of units: Speartip and Shield.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I — Power of Offense and Defense

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Defeat the enhanced summons first to weaken Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will additionally summon The Honored units.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II — Battle for Glory

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc:
The Silver Knight of Virtuous Gallantry will change their status throughout the fight:
Chivalric Wrath: Summons Speartip statues and takes less DMG from all sources. When 4 statues are on the field, the knight enters the Toughness Protection state.
Golden Harvest: Summons Shield statues and increases the knight's DMG dealt from all sources.
Medal of Elegance: Summons The Honored statues. When statues exist on the field, the knight cannot be selected as a target.
Child.Name: Combat Stance

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage can switch its own <color=#f29e38ff><u>Combat Stance</u></color> in battle and summon different statues to fight. When characters defeat statues in the "Soulfreed" state, DMG dealt by the team in this battle will be increased.
TagList.Name: Reversal of Fortune

TagList.Desc: When Boss Mirage uses "Soulfreed" in Phase II, it will target <color=#f29e38ff>all</color> statues.
TagList.Name: Turn Back the Tide

TagList.Desc: For <color=#f29e38ff>every unit</color> on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG and deal more DMG.
TagList.Name: Stellar Aegis

TextGuideList: After <color=#f29e38ff>Breaking</color> Boss Mirage, the DMG it receives is greatly increased, Skill Points are recovered for the team, and the team's action is Advanced Forward.
Defeat or break <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> first to effectively weaken Boss Mirage.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: All enemy units take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. At the moment Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is Broken</color>, Weakness Breaks all enemy units and causes its action to be additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

Breaking enemy weakness can <color=#f29e38ff>significantly reduce</color> Boss Mirage's Toughness. When all enemies are Weakness Broken, attacking any enemy will also <color=#f29e38ff>reduce</color> Boss Mirage's Toughness.
After the enemy gets <color=#f29e38ff>attacked a certain number of times</color> or has their Toughness reduced, they will be inflicted with Weakness Break, granting a chance for "Off-Class Channel."

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Use abilities that do AoE ATKs to simultaneously accumulate the Switch Tallies for multiple enemy targets.
PhaseList.Desc: Attacking units in the "Classroom Channel" state multiple times can switch it to the "Off-Class Channel" state and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
PhaseList.Name: Blaznana Monkey Trick

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Unit in the "Classroom Channel" state will gain 1 point in the Switch Tally when attacked. When the Switch Tally hits the max, it will switch the unit to the "Off-Class Channel" state and also reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
Child.Name: Switch Tally

TagList.Desc: All enemy units take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG and possesses <color=#f29e38ff><u>Switch Tally</u></color> while in "Classroom Channel." After Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is Broken</color>, the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: United Front

Child.Desc: Unit in the "Classroom Channel" state will gain 1 point in the Switch Tally when attacked. When the Switch Tally hits the max, it will switch the unit to the "Off-Class Channel" state and also reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
Child.Name: Switch Tally

TagList.Desc: At the beginning of every turn, enemy units in "Classroom Channel" will lose a certain number in the <color=#f29e38ff><u>Switch Tally</u></color>.
TagList.Name: Tally Loss

TagList.Desc: Increases SPD for "End-of-Semester Dinner."
TagList.Name: SPD Boost

TextGuideList: Using abilities that do <color=#f29e38ff>AoE ATKs</color> can simultaneously accumulate the Switch Tallies for multiple enemy targets.
Using abilities with <color=#f29e38ff>high Toughness Reduction</color> can rapidly Break the Weakness of units in the "Classroom Channel" state and cause them to switch channels.

"Soulfreed" <color=#f29e38ff>summons</color> will be greatly enhanced.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Use abilities that do AoE ATKs to simultaneously accumulate the Switch Tallies for multiple enemy targets.
PhaseList.Desc: Attacking units in the "Classroom Channel" state multiple times can switch it to the "Off-Class Channel" state and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
PhaseList.Name: Blaznana Monkey Trick

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Unit in the "Classroom Channel" state will gain 1 point in the Switch Tally when attacked. When the Switch Tally hits the max, it will switch the unit to the "Off-Class Channel" state and also reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
Child.Name: Switch Tally

TagList.Desc: All enemy units take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG and possesses <color=#f29e38ff><u>Switch Tally</u></color> while in "Classroom Channel." After Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is Broken</color>, the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: United Front

Child.Desc: Unit in the "Classroom Channel" state will gain 1 point in the Switch Tally when attacked. When the Switch Tally hits the max, it will switch the unit to the "Off-Class Channel" state and also reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and immediately obtain that unit's "Off-Class Channel" reward 1 time.
Child.Name: Switch Tally

TagList.Desc: At the beginning of every turn, enemy units in "Classroom Channel" will lose a certain number in the <color=#f29e38ff><u>Switch Tally</u></color>.
TagList.Name: Tally Loss

TagList.Desc: Increases SPD for "End-of-Semester Dinner."
TagList.Name: SPD Boost

TextGuideList: Using abilities that do <color=#f29e38ff>AoE ATKs</color> can simultaneously accumulate the Switch Tallies for multiple enemy targets.
Using abilities with <color=#f29e38ff>high Toughness Reduction</color> can rapidly Break the Weakness of units in the "Classroom Channel" state and cause them to switch channels.

Buff.Desc: When enemy targets with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, dispels control states for all allies, and allies immediately take action and recovers Skill Points.\nIncreases Break DMG taken by all enemy targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and Memosprite Skill DMG taken by<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: Increases Physical DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. When a unit uses a Skill, restores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of that unit's HP.
BuffList1.Name: Crimson Tide

BuffList1.Desc: When ally targets deal DMG to enemy targets afflicted with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> DoT states or more, increases Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList1.Name: Dire Straits

BuffList1.Desc: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s)
BuffList1.Name: Rime Piercer

BuffList2.Desc: DMG dealt by memosprites ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's DEF.
BuffList2.Name: Unstoppable Force

BuffList2.Desc: Increases all allies' Skill DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. At the start of their turn, if their current HP percentage is equal to or lower than <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, restores HP equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of their Max HP.
BuffList2.Name: Innervation

BuffList2.Desc: When a character uses Ultimate, increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList2.Name: Unstoppable Momentum

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff>transmit its own Weakness Type to the summon</color>. After any one of its summons is defeated, the summon's Weakness Type will be <color=#f29e38ff>added</color> to the remaining summons.

Attacking summons reduces Boss Mirage's HP by an <color=#f29e38ff>equal amount</color>. After any summon is eliminated, the remaining summons' SPD increases, and <color=#f29e38ff>the DMG they take increases</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize defeating the summons. Defeating all summons will make the Weakness Type transmit back to the Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will summon Blaze Out of Space and Ice Out of Space to assist it in battle, and transmit its own Weakness Type to the summons.
PhaseList.Name: Phase I: Cryopyre Duet

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize defeating the summons. Defeating all summons will make the Weakness Type transmit back to the Boss Mirage.
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage will summon Dreamjolt Troupe's Beyond Overcooked and Memory Zone Meme "Shell of Faded Rage" to assist it in battle, and transmit its own Weakness Type to the summons.
PhaseList.Name: Phase II: The Game Is On

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, action gets additionally delayed and DMG taken increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Transmits the Weakness Type to the target. After the target is defeated, additionally reduces Toughness. The Weakness Type will return once all targets that gained the Weakness Type are defeated.
Child.Name: Transmit

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage summons 2 Elite Enemies to assist in battle. Boss Mirage will <color=#f29e38ff><u>transmit</u></color> its own Weakness Type to summons, but when those summons are defeated, Boss Mirage's Toughness will be additionally reduced.
TagList.Name: Battlefield Transfer

TagList.Desc: For <color=#f29e38ff>every unit</color> on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG.
TagList.Name: Stellar Aegis

TagList.Desc: When the Boss Mirage uses "Puppet Understudy" in its second phase, it will apply Enhancement effects to <color=#f29e38ff>all summons</color>.
TagList.Name: Turn Back the Tide

TextGuideList: Prioritize <color=#f29e38ff>defeating summons</color>. Doing so will <color=#f29e38ff>transmit</color> their Weakness Type back to the Boss Mirage.
After defeating any summon, increases DMG received by other summons. Take advantage of this mechanism to quickly defeat other summons.
Increase Effect RES or use abilities to remove the <color=#f29e38ff>Dominated</color> status applied by Boss Mirage.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

In this combat, ally targets' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.

When an ally target's HP decreases, the Boss Mirage in "Dream of Demise" state will accumulate "Desperate Bubble." When "Desperate Bubble" reaches its maximum, Boss Mirage enters the "Fragrance of Death" state, greatly enhancing the abilities of Boss Mirage and its summons.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize healing ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Desc: In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Deathwish

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Before "Death Wishes For More Death" is used, restore HP to dispel the "HP Overload" state from all ally units.
PhaseList.Desc: When Boss Mirage uses "Death Wishes For More Death," it will deal fatal damage to ally targets in "HP Overload" state.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: From Death, Comes Life

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: In this combat, ally units' HP will not drop below 1, and any DMG taken exceeding a certain amount of their current HP will be converted into "HP Overload." Ally units in the "HP Overload" state will have their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency greatly reduced.
TagList.Name: Withered Verdure

TagList.Desc: "The Long Arms of Sorrow's" Max Toughness increases.
TagList.Name: Tender the Rigid

TagList.Desc: Reduces DMG received by all enemies, but every <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Type</color> they have increases DMG received.
TagList.Name: Tenacious Resolve

TextGuideList: When ally targets enter the "HP Overload" state, their DMG dealt and Weakness Break Efficiency are greatly reduced. Prioritize restoring their HP to dispel this state.

Inflicting Weakness Break on "The Long Arms of Sorrow" will reduce the Boss Mirage's Toughness and HP. If the Boss Mirage is in the "Fragrance of Death" state, it will also restore allies' HP.

Buff.Desc: When an enemy target with <color=#f29e38ff>"Steadfast Safeguard"</color> is inflicted with <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Break</color>, dispels control states from all allies, restores Skill Points, immediately takes action, and grants Aha an extra turn (this turn will count as <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> fixed Punchline points).\nIncreases Elation DMG dealt to all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> and Break DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
Buff.Name: Ruinous Embers

BuffList1.Desc: All allies' Elation DMG ignores <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of enemy target's All-Type RES. When an enemy target's "War Armor" or "Centirefined War Armor" are broken, gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> Punchline points.
BuffList1.Name: Oppose With Tenderness

BuffList1.Desc: After an ally target uses their Ultimate, the CRIT DMG dealt by their Skill increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList1.Name: Montane Gush

BuffList1.Desc: Increases Follow-Up ATK and Ultimate DMG dealt by all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> against enemy targets in Weakness Broken state.
BuffList1.Name: Moment of Opportunity

BuffList2.Desc: Increases all enemies' Break DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Breaking an enemy's Weakness, increases all allies' SPD by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
BuffList2.Name: Collapse on Sight

BuffList2.Desc: Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. Additionally increases the CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> for the 1st character in the team lineup and their memosprite.
BuffList2.Name: Essence of Gold

BuffList2.Desc: Increases DoT dealt to enemy targets in the Weakness Broken state by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.
BuffList2.Name: Devastating Heartbreak

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

Boss Mirage and its summons have <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color>, reducing DMG taken by them. In phase two, <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color> will be enhanced to <color=#f29e38ff>"Centirefined War Armor"</color>, greatly increasing the maximum stack limit, and Boss Mirage will gain additional <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness Protection</color>.

At the start of combat, all allies gain 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory"</color>. Ally units gain 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory"</color> for each <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Point</color> consumed (memomasters and their memosprites will share "Glory" stacks). Each stack of "Glory" increases CRIT DMG, and when enemy targets with "War Armor" are attacked, reduces their stacks of "War Armor" by an amount equal to the attacker's "Glory" stacks. Targets' <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points can exceed the maximum limit</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize consuming Skill Points to gain "Glory," which increases your CRIT DMG and reduces more stacks of "War Armor".
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons have "War Armor", reducing DMG taken by them.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Iron Steeds and Golden Spears

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Reducing the "Centirefined War Armor" of the summons before each Boss Mirage's action can effectively weaken the Boss Mirage's abilities.
PhaseList.Desc: The "War Armor" of Boss Mirage and its summons are enhanced into "Centirefined War Armor." Summons with "Centirefined War Armor" enhance Boss Mirage's abilities.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Face-off with the Enemy

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Decreases DMG taken. Loses stacks of "War Armor" based on the attacker's "Glory" stacks when attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing their Toughness, delaying their action, and restoring Skill Point(s) to targets. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.
Child.Name: War Armor

Child.Desc: Decreases DMG taken. After being attacked, reduces stacks of "Centirefined War Armor" based on the attacker's "Glory" stacks. When reduced to 0 stacks, "Centirefined War Armor" is destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing a large amount of Toughness, delaying their action, restoring Skill Points to targets, and granting the attacker certain stacks of "Glory." After "Centirefined War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. If "Centirefined War Armor" is at 0 stacks at the end of this unit's turn, it will be restored to maximum stacks.
Child.Name: Centirefined War Armor

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons have <color=#f29e38ff><u>"War Armor"</u></color>, reducing DMG taken by them. In phase two, <color=#f29e38ff><u>"War Armor"</u></color> will be enhanced to <color=#f29e38ff><u>"Centirefined War Armor"</u></color>, greatly increasing the maximum stack limit, and Boss Mirage will gain additional Toughness Protection.
TagList.Name: Ironclad Renitence

TagList.Desc: In Phase 2, the max stack of Boss Mirage's "Centirefined War Armor" will increase.
TagList.Name: Taint of the Sublime

TagList.Desc: For <color=#f29e38ff>every unit</color> on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG and deal more DMG.
TagList.Name: Protective Formation

TextGuideList: Prioritize <color=#f29e38ff>consuming Skill Points</color> to gain <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory,"</color> increasing CRIT DMG dealt and reducing enemy "War Armor" stacks. Ally <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points can exceed the maximum limit</color>.

When enemy targets have <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color>, their DEF is greatly increased. Reducing their "War Armor" will increase the DMG they take and <color=#f29e38ff>recover Skill Points</color>.

In Phase 2, when summons have <color=#f29e38ff>"Centirefined War Armor"</color>, the Boss Mirage's abilities will be enhanced. Prioritizing reducing the summons' "Centirefined War Armor" can effectively <color=#f29e38ff>weaken the Boss Mirage's abilities</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and all other parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When the Boss Mirage's parts get <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, the Toughness of the Boss Mirage will be reduced.

When the Boss Mirage uses "Soul-Shattering Malediction," causes ally characters to <color=#f29e38ff>enter the "Malediction" state</color>. Ally characters and summons in the "Malediction" state will Depart the field. At the same time, summons Bloodstained Lupine to replace the Departed character and continue the battle, and the "Bloodstained Lupine"'s attacks can cause <color=#f29e38ff>heavy Toughness Reduction</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: When "Soul-Shattering Malediction" is used, prioritize selecting non-DMG dealing ally characters as the target of the ability.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Soul-Shattering Malediction" to inflict the "Malediction" effect on allies.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Unyielding Winds

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Do what you can to break all parts before "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" is used.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" to deal high DMG and debuffs.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Sweep the Heavens

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: Parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, the DMG they receive increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steelbone Summit

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage's Toughness increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Sickleclawed Sawteeth

TagList.Desc: The duration of <color=#f29e38ff>"Malediction"</color> state increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
TagList.Name: Beastly Rage

TextGuideList: Weakness Break Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>parts</color> multiple times to effectively reduce Boss Mirage's Toughness. <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> Boss Mirage to greatly increase the DMG taken by itself and all its parts, while recovering Skill Points and activating Ultimates for all allies.

When <color=#f29e38ff>"Bloodstained Lupine"</color> replaces an ally character in battle, it will additionally <color=#f29e38ff>reduce Toughness irrespective of Weakness Types</color> based on the <color=#f29e38ff>number of DoT debuffs</color> inflicted on the enemy target attacked. "Bloodstained Lupine's" <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> can restore HP for all ally targets, and its <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> can hit multiple enemy targets while greatly reducing their Toughness. This <color=#f29e38ff>does not consume Skill Points</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

Boss Mirage and its summons have <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color>, reducing DMG taken by them. In phase two, <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color> will be enhanced to <color=#f29e38ff>"Centirefined War Armor"</color>, greatly increasing the maximum stack limit, and Boss Mirage will gain additional <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness Protection</color>.

At the start of combat, all allies gain 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory"</color>. Ally units gain 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory"</color> for each <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Point</color> consumed (memomasters and their memosprites will share "Glory" stacks). Each stack of "Glory" increases CRIT DMG, and when enemy targets with "War Armor" are attacked, reduces their stacks of "War Armor" by an amount equal to the attacker's "Glory" stacks. Targets' <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points can exceed the maximum limit</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Prioritize consuming Skill Points to gain "Glory," which increases your CRIT DMG and reduces more stacks of "War Armor".
PhaseList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons have "War Armor", reducing DMG taken by them.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Iron Steeds and Golden Spears

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Reducing the "Centirefined War Armor" of the summons before each Boss Mirage's action can effectively weaken the Boss Mirage's abilities.
PhaseList.Desc: The "War Armor" of Boss Mirage and its summons are enhanced into "Centirefined War Armor." Summons with "Centirefined War Armor" enhance Boss Mirage's abilities.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Face-off with the Enemy

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and increases its DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

Child.Desc: Decreases DMG taken. Loses stacks of "War Armor" based on the attacker's "Glory" stacks when attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing their Toughness, delaying their action, and restoring Skill Point(s) to targets. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.
Child.Name: War Armor

Child.Desc: Decreases DMG taken. After being attacked, reduces stacks of "Centirefined War Armor" based on the attacker's "Glory" stacks. When reduced to 0 stacks, "Centirefined War Armor" is destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit, reducing a large amount of Toughness, delaying their action, restoring Skill Points to targets, and granting the attacker certain stacks of "Glory." After "Centirefined War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. If "Centirefined War Armor" is at 0 stacks at the end of this unit's turn, it will be restored to maximum stacks.
Child.Name: Centirefined War Armor

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage and its summons have <color=#f29e38ff><u>"War Armor"</u></color>, reducing DMG taken by them. In phase two, <color=#f29e38ff><u>"War Armor"</u></color> will be enhanced to <color=#f29e38ff><u>"Centirefined War Armor"</u></color>, greatly increasing the maximum stack limit, and Boss Mirage will gain additional Toughness Protection.
TagList.Name: Ironclad Renitence

TagList.Desc: In Phase 2, the max stack of Boss Mirage's "Centirefined War Armor" will increase.
TagList.Name: Taint of the Sublime

TagList.Desc: For <color=#f29e38ff>every unit</color> on the enemy's side of the field aside from Boss Mirage, all enemies receive less DMG and deal more DMG.
TagList.Name: Protective Formation

TextGuideList: Prioritize <color=#f29e38ff>consuming Skill Points</color> to gain <color=#f29e38ff>"Glory,"</color> increasing CRIT DMG dealt and reducing enemy "War Armor" stacks. Ally <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points can exceed the maximum limit</color>.

When enemy targets have <color=#f29e38ff>"War Armor"</color>, their DEF is greatly increased. Reducing their "War Armor" will increase the DMG they take and <color=#f29e38ff>recover Skill Points</color>.

In Phase 2, when summons have <color=#f29e38ff>"Centirefined War Armor"</color>, the Boss Mirage's abilities will be enhanced. Prioritizing reducing the summons' "Centirefined War Armor" can effectively <color=#f29e38ff>weaken the Boss Mirage's abilities</color>.

DifficultyGuideList.Desc: Boss Mirage and all other parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
When the Boss Mirage's parts get <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness Broken</color>, the Toughness of the Boss Mirage will be reduced.

When the Boss Mirage uses "Soul-Shattering Malediction," causes ally characters to <color=#f29e38ff>enter the "Malediction" state</color>. Ally characters and summons in the "Malediction" state will Depart the field. At the same time, summons Bloodstained Lupine to replace the Departed character and continue the battle, and the "Bloodstained Lupine"'s attacks can cause <color=#f29e38ff>heavy Toughness Reduction</color>.

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: When "Soul-Shattering Malediction" is used, prioritize selecting non-DMG dealing ally characters as the target of the ability.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Soul-Shattering Malediction" to inflict the "Malediction" effect on allies.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 1: Unyielding Winds

PhaseList.Answer: Strategy: Do what you can to break all parts before "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" is used.
PhaseList.Desc: The Boss Mirage will use "Sweep the Heavens, Swallow the Earth" to deal high DMG and debuffs.
PhaseList.Name: Phase 2: Sweep the Heavens

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage takes <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After its <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, its action is additionally delayed and the DMG it receives increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steadfast Safeguard

TagList.Desc: Parts take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> less DMG. After Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>Weakness is broken</color>, the DMG they receive increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Steelbone Summit

TagList.Desc: Boss Mirage's Toughness increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>.
TagList.Name: Sickleclawed Sawteeth

TagList.Desc: The duration of <color=#f29e38ff>"Malediction"</color> state increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> turn(s).
TagList.Name: Beastly Rage

TextGuideList: Weakness Break Boss Mirage's <color=#f29e38ff>parts</color> multiple times to effectively reduce Boss Mirage's Toughness. <color=#f29e38ff>Break</color> Boss Mirage to greatly increase the DMG taken by itself and all its parts, while recovering Skill Points and activating Ultimates for all allies.

When <color=#f29e38ff>"Bloodstained Lupine"</color> replaces an ally character in battle, it will additionally <color=#f29e38ff>reduce Toughness irrespective of Weakness Types</color> based on the <color=#f29e38ff>number of DoT debuffs</color> inflicted on the enemy target attacked. "Bloodstained Lupine's" <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> can restore HP for all ally targets, and its <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> can hit multiple enemy targets while greatly reducing their Toughness.
